ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_position_creation" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "positions_created" INTEGER /* Total number of positions created in the given year */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the positions created */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the positions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_position_creation_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_positions" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the total records */,
  "total_created" INTEGER /* Total created positions for that year */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the total positions */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the total positions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_positions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilization_rates" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "utilization_percent" REAL /* Percentage of total created positions that are utilized */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the positions being utilized */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the utilized positions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilization_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unfilled_positions" (
  "unfilled_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unfilled record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "unfilled_count" INTEGER /* Number of unfilled positions for that year */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the unfilled positions */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the unfilled positions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unfilled_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unfilled_positions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description detailing the policy */,
  "implementation_year" INTEGER /* Year when the policy was implemented */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the policy is implemented */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_policies_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_policies_implementation_year FOREIGN KEY ("implementation_year") REFERENCES annual_position_creation ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view report, update data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
